name: Lost and Found System
description: a full-stack lost-and-found management platform using React/TypeScript and Flask with secure admin authentication, claim/report workflows, and intelligent item matching to streamline campus property recovery.

name: iKnowIlocos
description: a Python-based Ilocos Festival information application that delivers festival-related content through an interactive command-line program.

name: Lam Ang Chronicles
description: a narrative-driven 2D game in Godot, integrating custom dialogue systems, character state management,combat mechanics, and asset-rich scene design inspired by the Lam-Ang chronicles.

name: RISE
description: a React and TypeScript-based civic engagement web application that features project tracking, interactice mapping community reporting, and analytics dashboards to supports transparent public information access.

name: Music Converter
description: a PHP-based Music Converter web application featuring user authentication, file upload and organization, and dashboard functionality for managing media content.

name: Truth Table Generator
description: a Python-based Truth Table Generator that evaluates logical expressions and produces structured truth table outputs for proprositional logic analysis.

name: Cafe Management System
description: a C++-based Cafe Management System designed to handle menu display, order processing, and sales record management through a file-driven console application.
